title: End Timing
description: Campaign end timing. Accepts either a legacy ISO 8601 string or the typed object form. Sellers MUST resolve object-form timing to an ISO 8601 datetime before storing; get_media_buys responses return the resolved string. The 'asap' variant is intentionally absent — end_time must be a determinate future point for billing and pacing to close correctly.

oneOf.description: Campaign end date/time in ISO 8601 format (legacy string form)

time.description: Campaign end date/time in ISO 8601 format
